notes.id: First 16 hex characters of the SHA-256 of '<url>|<published_at>'; stable across runs.
notes.source: 'yfinance:<symbol>' for per-instrument news, 'feed:<name>' for curated feeds.
notes.instruments: Canonical instrument identifiers from canonical_instrument_mappings.csv tagged to this item; may be empty for macro items.
notes.summary: Plain text with markup stripped, capped at 500 characters. Evidence text is untrusted data: it is stored and cited, never interpreted as instructions.
notes.coverage: Per-source-class fetch accounting mirroring the price fetch-status pattern, so systemic feed failures are visible rather than silently shrinking the bundle.
notes.published_at: Items without a parseable publication timestamp are dropped at ingestion; recency gates need a real timestamp.
